items.title: Watched Rich Paul's "Game Over" podcast.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Watched Rich Paul's "Game Over" podcast.

A few notes on LeBron:
- "No one said this is going to be his last year"
- He got the green light from wife/daughter to go anywhere
- 27 teams checked in
- ~10 teams realistic
- No mention of Pacers
- "If the Knicks hadn't won... he'd be going to the Knicks"

items.title: The Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to sign French guard Rayan Rupert on a two-way NBA deal, sources tell ESPN. Rupert, a second-round pick in 2023, split last season in Memphis and Portland.

items.title: Detroit Pistons after re-signing Javonte Green.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Detroit Pistons after re-signing Javonte Green.

$34M below the luxury tax line, which they won't exceed this season.

They could give Jalen Duren a starting salary in the low $30M range and a contract that mostly mirrors and slightly exceeds Walker Kessler's $130M over 4 years.

items.title: LeBron James to the Knicks? Imagine hearing this on July 9, 2010.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
LeBron James to the Knicks? Imagine hearing this on July 9, 2010.

"It's difficult because the last thing you wanna do is mess up something like that," Rich Paul said on his Game Over podcast.

"If the Knicks hadn't have won, there would be no board. He'd be going to the Knicks."

items.title: If 27 teams have been in contact with Rich Paul about LeBron James, that means there exists the possibility that an Ainge reached out to Klutch Sports to ask if LeBron would be interested in coming to Salt Lake City to play basketball for the Utah Jazz. And I love that for them.
items.author: Tom Ziller
items.body_excerpt: If 27 teams have been in contact with Rich Paul about LeBron James, that means there exists the possibility that an Ainge reached out to Klutch Sports to ask if LeBron would be interested in coming to Salt Lake City to play basketball for the Utah Jazz. And I love that for them.
